global.title: Vetra remote drives enable team collaboration by syncing specifications across developers
global.content:
Vetra supports collaborative development through remote drives:

- **Without `--remote-drive`**: Creates a local drive in browser local storage (solo development)
- **With `--remote-drive <url>`**: Connects to a shared remote drive

Key workflows:
- **Project Owner**: `ph init --remote-drive <url>` -> Create GitHub repo -> Push -> `ph vetra --watch`
- **Collaborator**: `ph checkout --remote-drive <url>` -> `ph vetra --watch`

The **preview drive** (created with `--watch` mode) provides a safe testing environment:
- The main "Vetra" drive syncs with the remote and contains stable configuration
- The "Vetra Preview" drive is local-only for testing document models and editors before syncing

Remote drive configuration is stored in `powerhouse.config.json`:
```json
"vetra": {
  "driveId": "bai-specifications",
  "driveUrl": "https://switchboard.staging.vetra.io/d/bai-specifications"
}
```
global.description: Teams share a remote Vetra drive via --remote-drive flag. Preview drives let you test locally before syncing to the team.
